review_text: Wonderful staff beautifully cleaned and maintained. Cosy cabins great location.
Quiet end of town but walkable to all locations. A great team on site, another great choice for a Lakes Entrance stay.

We stayed just the one night as we were returning home from an interstate road trip and needed somewhere to settle in for the night. The accommodation was as what you would expect from a holiday park. The cabin was older but sufficiently comfortable. It was day three of an extreme heat wave so the air conditioner had work to do, but it did the job by cooling the cabin down.

Would happily stay again.
We coming here for about 15 years. Great quite place, that is if you come after school holidays. Otherways booked well in advance. There are people booking for mext year i even before they go.

Immaculate pet friendly cabin with all that you could want for a comfortable stay.
Wish we could have stayed longer in this beautiful area.
Cheryl on reception was lovely.
Lovely friendly staff and management.. we were made very welcome.

It exceeded our expectations for the price we paid. Very clean and all the facilities you need.
New split systems air con. Also a very quiet location. The reception was friendly and the park was well maintained.
